name: Pattern POP
description: The Pattern POP is a generator that makes simple line strip shapes using elementary math functions in X, Y and Z. Alternately it can add a new attribute to an input POP using the elementary math functions. The math functions include sine, cos, triangles, square waves, as well as ease in/out and random. Parameters control phase, repeats and re-ranging. The Pattern POP can: * make one or more 3D line strips generating a P attribute containing a different curve in X, Y and Z. (it can create Tex at the same time). (generator) * add a new attribute (1-4 components) to an input POP, each component containing a separate type of curve. (filter) * modify an existing attribute of an input POP by adding/multiplying the curve to it. (filter) * create a POP that has no P attribute - just a curve in a new attribute. (generator) See also: [[Curve POP]], [[Math Mix POP]]

parameters.name: Number of Points
parameters.label: Number of Points
parameters.description: Sets the number of points.

parameters.name: Cyclic
parameters.label: Cyclic
parameters.description: Enable having completes cycle correspond to Number of Points + 1 values.

parameters.name: Connectivity
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines whether and how to connect the points.

parameters.name: Parameter Size
parameters.label: Parameter Size
parameters.description: Number of independent configurable parameter values.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Determines the pattern type.

parameters.name: Seed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: Numerical value that initializes the randomization.

parameters.name: Number of Cycles
parameters.label: Number of Cycles
parameters.description: Set the number of repeating cycles of the Type shapes over the Length, except for Random.

parameters.name: Step per Cycle
parameters.label: Step per Cycle
parameters.description: Step added to each cycle.

parameters.name: Bias
parameters.label: Bias
parameters.description: Makes Triangle type into a sawtooth wave, and sets the Square type variable-width.

parameters.name: Phase
parameters.label: Phase
parameters.description: Shifts the cycle.

parameters.name: Exponent
parameters.label: Exponent
parameters.description: Sets the exponent. The internal value is raised by the power of the exponent

parameters.name: Map from Low
parameters.label: Map from Low
parameters.description: Reranges the attribute value.

parameters.name: Map from High
parameters.label: Map from High
parameters.description: Reranges the attribute value.

parameters.name: Map to Low
parameters.label: Map to Low
parameters.description: Reranges the attribute value.

parameters.name: Map to High
parameters.label: Map to High
parameters.description: Reranges the attribute value.

parameters.name: Reverse
parameters.label: Reverse
parameters.description: Enable reverse order.

parameters.name: Line Break Each Cycle
parameters.label: Line Break Each Cycle
parameters.description: When on, creates a line break at each cycle.

parameters.name: Closed
parameters.label: Closed
parameters.description: The last vertex is connected to the first vertex.

parameters.name: Output Line Break Attribute
parameters.label: Output Line Break Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to output a LineBreak attribute.

parameters.name: Texture Coordinates
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Sets the texture coordinate mode relative to the cylcles.

parameters.name: Combine Operation
parameters.label: Combine Operation
parameters.description: Specify how to combine the output value with the combine attribute value.

parameters.name: Combine Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Combine Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Input attribute scope for the combine operation.

parameters.name: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: Attribute Class
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the POP operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: Group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this POP to act only upon the group specified.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Pattern_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
